envoy_id.description: Stable identifier for this Envoy in the federation. Appears in AS-PATH.

envoy_admin_url.description: Base URL of the local Envoy admin endpoint.

advertise_listen.description: host:port to serve /advertisements on for peer cluster-router processes.

target_cluster_source.description: Where to read the target cluster name from on each request.

target_cluster_header.description: Request header name when target_cluster_source is `header`.

next_hop_header.description: Header name written by the filter for `cluster_header` routes.

peers.description: Outbound peers this Envoy pulls advertisements from and routes traffic to.

local_cluster.description: Name of the local Envoy cluster that routes data-plane traffic to this peer.

weight.description: Per-link cost added to advertised distance during best-path selection.

poll_interval.description: How often to poll local Envoy admin and peer advertisements (Go duration).

stale_after.description: Drop routes from a peer whose last successful sync is older than this (Go duration).
